Why Needed: Required to model physical hardware stress and thermal throttling.
Generation Rule: Base temp + (Load % * Factor). Inject spikes preceding failure events.

Why Needed: Critical leading indicator for permanent GPU/Memory faults.
Generation Rule: Sparse counts heavily clustered in the 1-6 hour window preceding a known failure.

Why Needed: Simulates cluster-level switch failures or bandwidth starvation.
Generation Rule: Inject high latency metrics during periods of unexplained utilization drops.

Why Needed: Required to calculate impact estimation (wasted compute).
Generation Rule: Inject regular intervals (e.g. every 4 hours). Wasted = Failure Time - Last Checkpoint.

Why Needed: The target variable for the predictive model.
Generation Rule: Sliding boolean window (e.g. 30 mins) prior to exact failure timestamp.
